MunicipalReport.title: Municipal report
MunicipalReport.description: View the consolidated data available for a municipality and period.
MunicipalReport.selectionDescription: Fill in the information below and then click “generate report”.
MunicipalReport.selectAreaHint: Choose the municipality to be analyzed in the report.
MunicipalReport.selectModulesHint: Choose the indicators to include in the report.
MunicipalReport.invalidPeriod: Enter a period in YYYY or YYYY-MM format.
MunicipalReport.availabilityIdle: Select a municipality and period to check the modules.
MunicipalReport.checkingAvailability: Checking modules available for the period...
MunicipalReport.noModulesAvailable: No modules have data for this period.
MunicipalReport.popupBlocked: The browser blocked the print window. Allow pop-ups to download the report.
MunicipalReport.emptyPreviewDescription: Select the municipality, period, and available modules to generate the report.
MunicipalReport.emptyPreviewInstruction: Select the information on the side first to generate a report
MunicipalReport.loadingHint: This may take a few seconds, depending on the selected modules.
MunicipalReport.loadError: The report could not be loaded
MunicipalReport.futurePlaceholder: Reserved for maps, charts, automated text, and integrated synthesis.

document.mainTitle: Analytical Report of the Strategic System on Desertification
document.subtitle: Law No. 13,153/2015 · National Policy to Combat Desertification
document.legalReferenceValue: Law No. 13,153/2015 — National Policy to Combat Desertification and Mitigate the Effects of Drought.
document.automatedNotice: This report was automatically generated by the Strategic System on Desertification (SEDES). The presented values are produced from data available on the platform.
document.footer: SEDES — Analytical Report | Generated at: {generatedAt} | MMA/DCDE · OCA · UFCG · INSA

narrative.absoluteFallback: In the municipality of {place}, the value of {className} is {value}, according to {title} data for the period of {period}.
narrative.percentageFallback: In the municipality of {place}, the {className} class predominates, with {percentage}% of the analyzed area {coverageContext}, according to {title} data for the period of {period}.

historyNarrative.noPrevious: No previous month available for comparison.
historyNarrative.stable: The classification remained stable compared to the previous month, when {prevClass} also predominated.
historyNarrative.improvement: There was improvement compared to the previous month, when {prevClass} predominated; in the current period there is no predominant condition of {phenomenon}.
historyNarrative.worsening: There was worsening compared to the previous month, when {prevClass} predominated; in the current period {currClass} now predominates.
historyNarrative.worseningRank: There was worsening compared to the previous month, when {prevClass} predominated.
historyNarrative.improvementRank: There was reduction compared to the previous month, when {prevClass} predominated.
historyNarrative.recent: The historical series for {title} records that {place} showed a condition of {phenomenon} in {affected} of the last {total} analyzed periods ({firstPeriod} to {currentPeriod}). In the reference period ({currentPeriod}), {currClass} predominates. {comparison}
historyNarrative.context: In the period {firstPeriod}–{currentPeriod}, the most frequent predominant class was {mostFreqClass}, in {mostFreqPerc}% of periods. The {neutralState} condition predominated in {neutralPerc}% of the period. The highest {severityTerm} observed was {maximumText}.

MunicipalReport.periodResolutionDiff: Requested period: {requested}; available period used in report: {available}.
MunicipalReport.rasterDescription: Thematic raster of {title} for {period}, visually clipped by the municipal boundary of {municipality} — {uf}.
MunicipalReport.historicalNoteText: The available series for this indicator includes {count} period(s), covering {range}. {resolution}

anaseca.title: Drought Monitor
anaseca.methodology: Produced by the National Water and Sanitation Agency (ANA), with monthly availability and drought severity classification.

monitor-de-secas.title: Drought Monitor
monitor-de-secas.methodology: Produced by the National Water and Sanitation Agency (ANA), with monthly availability and drought severity classification.

monitor-de-seca-ana.title: Drought Monitor | ANA
monitor-de-seca-ana.methodology: Monitors the drought situation in Brazil based on ANA's official monthly classification.

indicearidez.title: Aridity Index
indicearidez.methodology: Calculated by the ratio between annual precipitation and potential evapotranspiration, with decadal references available on the platform.

indice-de-aridez.title: Aridity Index
indice-de-aridez.methodology: Calculated by the ratio between annual precipitation and potential evapotranspiration, with decadal references available on the platform.

deg.title: Land Degradation Index
deg.methodology: Territorial indicator produced to characterize different levels of conservation and degradation of soil and vegetation cover.

indice-de-degradacao-da-terra.title: Land Degradation Index
indice-de-degradacao-da-terra.methodology: Territorial indicator produced to characterize different levels of conservation and degradation of soil and vegetation cover.

indice-de-degradacao.title: Degradation Index
indice-de-degradacao.methodology: Shows land degradation levels in Brazil, from conserved to more degraded areas.

carbonoembrapa.title: Soil Organic Carbon | Embrapa
carbonoembrapa.methodology: Shows the distribution of soil organic carbon in Brazil based on Embrapa data.

carbono.title: Carbon
carbono.methodology: Shows the distribution of soil organic carbon in Brazil based on Embrapa data.

prev_anomalia_precipitacao.title: Forecast: Precipitation Anomaly
prev_anomalia_precipitacao.methodology: Precipitation anomaly forecast elaborated based on climate data from CPTEC/INPE.

previsao-anomalia-de-precipitacao.title: Forecast: Precipitation Anomaly
previsao-anomalia-de-precipitacao.methodology: Precipitation anomaly forecast elaborated based on climate data from CPTEC/INPE.

CDI_Test.title: Composite Drought Index (CDI)
CDI_Test.methodology: Monthly monitors drought stages based on the Composite Drought Index (CDI) implemented by OCA following Cammalleri et al. 2021.

cdi.title: Composite Drought Index (CDI)
cdi.methodology: Monthly monitors drought stages based on the Composite Drought Index (CDI) implemented by OCA following Cammalleri et al. 2021.

pob_total.title: Families in poverty
pob_total.methodology: Percentage of families registered in CadÚnico in poverty aggregated by municipality.

familias-em-situacao-de-pobreza.title: Families in poverty
familias-em-situacao-de-pobreza.methodology: Percentage of families registered in CadÚnico in poverty aggregated by municipality.

pob_urb.title: Urban poverty
pob_urb.methodology: Territorial indicator available on the SEDES platform.

pobreza_urbana.title: Urban poverty
pobreza_urbana.methodology: Territorial indicator available on the SEDES platform.

pobreza-urbana.title: Urban poverty
pobreza-urbana.methodology: Territorial indicator available on the SEDES platform.

pob_rural.title: Rural poverty
pob_rural.methodology: Territorial indicator available on the SEDES platform.

pobreza_rural.title: Rural poverty
pobreza_rural.methodology: Territorial indicator available on the SEDES platform.

pobreza-rural.title: Rural poverty
pobreza-rural.methodology: Territorial indicator available on the SEDES platform.

cemadenseca.title: Cemaden: Drought
cemadenseca.methodology: Drought index elaborated from monitoring and observational data from Cemaden.

cemaden-seca.title: Cemaden: Drought
cemaden-seca.methodology: Drought index elaborated from monitoring and observational data from Cemaden.

ods.title: Sustainable Development Goals (SDG 15.3.1)
ods.methodology: Indicates whether land is degrading, stable, or improving in the Brazilian territory according to SDG 15.3.1 methodology.

objetivos-de-desenvolvimento-sustentavel.title: Sustainable Development Goals (SDG 15.3.1)
objetivos-de-desenvolvimento-sustentavel.methodology: Indicates whether land is degrading, stable, or improving in the Brazilian territory according to SDG 15.3.1 methodology.

prodprimariabruta.title: Gross Primary Production | MODIS
prodprimariabruta.methodology: Plant productivity and biomass indicator derived from MODIS remote sensing.

producao-primaria-bruta.title: Gross Primary Production | MODIS
producao-primaria-bruta.methodology: Plant productivity and biomass indicator derived from MODIS remote sensing.

terraibge.title: Land Cover | IBGE
terraibge.methodology: Presents the distribution of land cover and land use classes based on official IBGE mappings.

cobertura-da-terra.title: Land Cover | IBGE
cobertura-da-terra.methodology: Presents the distribution of land cover and land use classes based on official IBGE mappings.

s2id_secas_estiagens.title: Drought and Dryness Records (2004-2025)
s2id_secas_estiagens.methodology: Official compilation of emergency or disaster state decrees due to droughts and dryness from S2ID.

registros-de-secas-e-estiagens-2004-2025.title: Drought and Dryness Records (2004-2025)
registros-de-secas-e-estiagens-2004-2025.methodology: Official compilation of emergency or disaster state decrees due to droughts and dryness from S2ID.

indicators.defaultMethodology: Territorial indicator available on the SEDES platform.
